//: Deliberate, reviewed audit waivers. See ai-does-good-shit.md §2.
//how: Beyond the automatic 14-day grace window, add a waiver here to allow a known vuln. Each MUST have an id (advisory/CVE/GHSA), a reason, who approved it, and an expires date. Expired waivers fail the build.

//example.reason: No fix released upstream yet; not reachable from our code path.
